headline: Assessing Allstate (ALL) Valuation After Strong Multi‑Year Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Allstate is on investors’ radar today Allstate (ALL) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading sessions, with the share price around $206.17 and performance mixed over the past week, month, and past 3 months. For investors, the key question is how this current price lines up with Allstate’s recent returns, value score of 5, and fundamentals such as US$67.7b in revenue and US$10.2b in net income.
